other_observers: Brad Steger and wife, Bill Maynard and nephew, Mark Peterson; Stan Oswald found bird eariler in the day, around noon. Stan and as well as Duane Nelson saw the bird until 1245pm
specific_location: Adobe Creek Reservoir, along County line Road, east of the lake, between Roads 17 and 19.
description: A large owl, that was mostly white with brown feathers. No ear tufts, round head. See photos.Behaviors: Sitting on the ground, then seen flying between fence posts.Call: nonePlumage: unknown
photographer: Photographer: Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon Percival
